name: public_safety_predictive_queue_begins_northpine_rig_utl
premise: A unified command post is managing an active public-safety event with incomplete field reports and conflicting eyewitness accounts. A unified command post is managing an active public-safety event with incomplete field reports and conflicting eyewitness accounts. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: public safety predictive queue begins northpine rig utl. The moral tension is explicitly framed as rights versus utility: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A union steward and a patient-family advocate are both on the bridge demanding incompatible assurances. A wire cutoff and settlement window closes in under thirty minutes; reversals may be impossible until the next business day. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed.

agents.name: Omar Chen
agents.identity: I am Omar Chen, the accountable decision-maker on this Public Safety bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes utility whenever someone invokes rights.

agents.name: Luc Chandra
agents.identity: I am Luc Chandra, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so utility is not sacrificed by default just because rights feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect utility.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Omar Chen must decide under rights versus utility. What does Omar Chen do?
